goal: Share root cause analysis of the March 28 API outage, agree on three corrective actions, and assign owners with deadlines.

extensions.document_title: March 28 API Outage — Post-Incident Review and Corrective Actions
extensions.one_sentence_thesis: A cascading connection pool exhaustion caused a 47-minute API outage affecting 12,000 users, preventable with circuit breaker configuration and connection pool monitoring.
key_takeaways: Root cause was unbounded connection pool growth triggered by a slow downstream dependency
Circuit breaker was configured but timeout was set too high at 30 seconds
Mean time to detect was 14 minutes — alerting threshold was 5x too generous
Three corrective actions: circuit breaker tuning, pool monitoring alert, and load-shed runbook
